title: sphaerostephanos subulifolius
intro: Sphaerostephanos subulifolius, commonly known as the subulate fern, is a species of plant in the family Dryniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Sphaerostephanos subulifolius include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
